IIT Kharagpur Latest Updates and News

30 Jun, 2026 IIT Kharagpur JEE Advanced Cutoff 2026 has been released. Check round and course-wise IIT Kharagpur JEE Advanced Cutoff 2026.

  • Round 2 Cutoff for B.Tech is 509-11888 for the General Category.
  • B.Arch Round 2 Cutoff is 22956 for the General Category.
...Read More

IIT Kharagpur cutoff is available for JEE-Advanced, GATE, IIT-JAM, CAT here. You can check category wise IIT Kharagpur cutoff for popular courses such as B.Tech, BS, B.Arch, B.Tech + M.Tech, M.Tech, M.Arch, M.Arch., M.Sc + Ph.D., M.Sc + Ph.D, MBA, MHRM, PGDM below.

IIT Kharagpur offers admission to B.Tech through JEE-Advanced. For Admission in BS courses, IIT Kharagpur accept JEE-Advanced score. You can check the table below to know the accepted exams for courses offered by IIT Kharagpur (Cutoff Range below is across all categories).

Course Exam Cutoff
B.Tech JEE-Advanced 3 - 11888
BS JEE-Advanced 59 - 13588
B.Arch JEE-Advanced 1087 - 22956
M.Tech GATE 149 - 781
M.Arch GATE 322 - 620
M.Arch. GATE 305 - 592
M.Sc + Ph.D. IIT-JAM 140 - 961
M.Sc + Ph.D IIT-JAM 256 - 4969
MBA CAT 75 - 90
MHRM CAT 75 - 90
PGDM CAT 75 - 90

IIT Kharagpur JEE-Advanced Cutoff 2026

Students can take admission in B.Tech, BS, B.Arch, B.Tech + M.Tech programs at IIT Kharagpur based on JEE-Advanced score. As per IIT Kharagpur JEE-Advanced Cutoff 2026, the overall cutoff for B.Tech programs in Round 2 is 3 - 11888 across all categories.

  • For BS, The Overall closing rank in 2026 in Round 2 is 59 - 13588 across all categories.
  • For B.Arch, The Overall closing rank in 2026 in Round 2 is 1087 - 22956 across all categories.

B.Tech Computer Science and Engineering, BS Mathematics and Scientific Computing, B.Arch , are the top choices for students appearing in JEE-Advanced.

In 2026, B.Tech Computer Science and Engineering closing rank for General Category is 509 in Round 2.

  • For BS Mathematics and Scientific Computing, The JEE-Advanced closing rank 2026 for General is 1407 in Round 2.
  • For B.Arch Bachelor of Architecture [B.Arch], The JEE-Advanced closing rank 2026 for General is 22263 - 22956 in Round 2.

You can check B.Tech Computer Science and Engineering, BS Mathematics and Scientific Computing, B.Arch , category-wise closing rank for JEE-Advanced below:

IIT Kharagpur B.Tech Computer Science and Engineering Cutoff 2026

IIT Kharagpur JEE-Advanced Cutoff Trends

Admission at IIT Kharagpur in B.Tech Programs in 2026 was closed at 11888 rank whereas closing rank in 2025 was 11111 across all categories.

  • Admission in BS Programs in 2026 was closed at 13588 rank whereas closing rank in 2025 was 13685 across all categories.
  • Admission in B.Arch Programs in 2026 was closed at 22956 rank whereas closing rank in 2025 was 19141 across all categories.
  • Admission in B.Tech + M.Tech Programs in 2023 was closed at 12780 rank whereas closing rank in 2022 was 11583 across all categories.

IIT Kharagpur GATE Cutoff 2026

Students can take admission in M.Tech, M.Arch, M.Arch. programs at IIT Kharagpur based on GATE score. As per IIT Kharagpur GATE Cutoff 2025, the overall cutoff for M.Tech programs in Round 1 is 149 - 781 across all categories.

  • For M.Arch, The Overall closing marks in 2025 in Round 1 is 322 - 620 across all categories.
  • For M.Arch., The Overall closing marks in 2025 in Round 1 is 305 - 592 across all categories.

M.Tech Computer Science And Engineering, M.Arch City Planning, M.Arch. Sustainable Built Environment, are the top choices for students appearing in GATE.

In 2025, M.Tech Computer Science And Engineering closing marks for General Category is 781 in Round 1.

  • For M.Arch City Planning, The GATE closing marks 2025 for General is 620 in Round 1.
  • For M.Arch. Sustainable Built Environment, The GATE closing marks 2025 for General is 592 in Round 1.

You can check M.Tech Computer Science And Engineering, M.Arch City Planning, M.Arch. Sustainable Built Environment, category-wise closing marks for GATE below:

IIT Kharagpur IIT-JAM Cutoff 2026

Students can take admission in M.Sc + Ph.D., M.Sc + Ph.D programs at IIT Kharagpur based on IIT-JAM score. As per IIT Kharagpur IIT-JAM Cutoff 2026, the overall cutoff for M.Sc + Ph.D. programs in Round 3 is 140 - 961 across all categories.

  • For M.Sc + Ph.D, The Overall closing rank in 2026 in Round 3 is 256 - 4969 across all categories.

M.Sc + Ph.D. Geology, M.Sc + Ph.D Physics, are the top choices for students appearing in IIT-JAM.

In 2026, M.Sc + Ph.D. Geology closing rank for General Category is 140 - 156 in Round 3.

  • For M.Sc + Ph.D Physics, The IIT-JAM closing rank 2026 for General is 604 - 613 in Round 3.

You can check M.Sc + Ph.D. Geology, M.Sc + Ph.D Physics, category-wise closing rank for IIT-JAM below:

IIT Kharagpur CAT Cutoff 2026

Students can take admission in MBA, MHRM, PGDM programs at IIT Kharagpur based on CAT score. As per IIT Kharagpur CAT Cutoff 2025, the overall cutoff for MBA programs in Round 1 is 75 - 90 across all categories.

  • For MHRM, The Overall closing percentile in 2025 in Round 1 is 75 - 90 across all categories.
  • For PGDM, The Overall closing percentile in 2025 in Round 1 is 75 - 90 across all categories.

MBA General, MHRM , PGDM Business Analytics, are the top choices for students appearing in CAT.

In 2025, MBA General closing percentile for General Category is 90 in Round 1.

  • For MHRM Master of Human Resource Management [MHRM], The CAT closing percentile 2025 for General is 90 in Round 1.
  • For PGDM Business Analytics, The CAT closing percentile 2025 for General is 90 in Round 1.

You can check MBA General, MHRM , PGDM Business Analytics, category-wise closing percentile for CAT below:

IIT Kharagpur CAT Cutoff Trends

Admission at IIT Kharagpur in MBA Programs in 2025 was closed at 75 percentile whereas closing percentile in 2024 was 75 across all categories.

  • Admission in MHRM Programs in 2025 was closed at 75 percentile whereas closing percentile in 2024 was 75 across all categories.
  • Admission in PGDM Programs in 2025 was closed at 75 percentile whereas closing percentile in 2024 was 75 across all categories.

You can check category-wise and course-wise closing percentile trends below:

Cutoff Summary: IIT Kharagpur

  • GATE
  • JEE Advanced
  • IIT JAM

The GATE 2025 cutoff for admission to M.Tech and M.Arch programs at IIT Kharagpur for the General category ranges from 781 to 354. The most competitive program, M.Tech Computer Science and Engineering, had an admission cutoff of 781, followed by M.Tech Artificial Intelligence at 764. Other popular courses such as M.Tech Microelectronics and VLSI Design and M.Tech Entrepreneurship and Innovations saw cutoffs between 745 and 668. Programs like M.Tech Metallurgical & Materials Engineering and M.Tech Exploration Geoscience had cutoffs in the range of 358 to 354.

For OBC candidates, the cutoff score for admission ranged from 711 for M.Tech Computer Science and Engineering to 310 for M.Tech Rubber Technology. The SC category cutoff was between 598 for M.Tech Computer Science and Engineering and 160 for M.Tech Exploration Geoscience. For the ST category, scores varied from 473 for M.Tech Computer Science and Engineering to 149 for M.Tech Exploration Geoscience. Under the EWS category, admission cutoffs spanned from 757 for M.Tech Computer Science and Engineering to 290 for M.Tech Exploration Geoscience.

...Read More
 By Collegedunia’s Personal AI

What are the admission cutoffs for IIT Kharagpur’s Law School, for various categories?

Nidhi Shreelaw student at IIT Kharagpur

IIT Kharagpur’s Law School does not release in public any cutoffs for admission to its LLB and LLM programs. 

IIT Kharagpur selects students for its LLB program based on the marks obtained in a two-hour computer-based test (CBT). All questions are MCQ type, carrying 2 marks each. There is negative marking. The questions are based on Maths, Science, English, Logical reasoning and Legal Aptitude. For the LLM entrance exam, the questions are based on the LLB syllabus approved by the Bar council of India. 

You can check all sample questions at- https://gateoffice.iitkgp.ac.in/law/p14.php

Is 6.7 CGPA good for 1st semester at IIT Kharagpur?

Aditi BanerjeeLives in Bangalore

I suggest you not to score below 6.5 as CGPA 7 is a must to get admission in a good foreign university. However with a CGPA of 6.5 you can go for Government jobs. I know a friend who did not focus on CGPA and played football and today is struggling to get a good job.

It is all the more difficult to get a good CGPA after low marks in the first semester because the professors evaluate you on the basis of previous grades sometimes. However, you will get placement into a decent private company so you don’t have to worry much.

Basically, even after getting admission at a good institute like IIT KGP, you have to keep struggling to score high marks.

...Read More

Shikhar Srivas
Mar 24, 2024 16:20

Keeping the ROI in mind, and in terms of placement, alumni network, etc B.tech CSE is the best branch amongst all at IIT KGP, however if you are getting admission to any other branch too during counselling, you can opt for branch change which will depend on your CG in the first year and also the availability of seats in the target branch.

Sweta Kumari
Mar 21, 2024 18:09

As per the previous general category cutoff analysis, the last two-year cutoff was 733 in GATE for the Mtech in VLSI. IIT Kharagpur, GATE Cutoff 2023 for OBC Category is 654, and for the year 2022 was 658 for MTech in VLSI.  IIT Kharagpur, GATE Cutoff 2023 for the EWS Category is 665, and for the year 2022 was 691 for MTech in VLSI.  IIT Kharagpur, GATE Cutoff 2023 for SC Category is 522, and for the year 2022 was 604 for MTech in VLSI. IIT Kharagpur, GATE Cutoff 2023 for ST Category is 469, and for the year 2022 was 398 for MTech in VLSI.
